subject: docs: record PWA polish cleanup sweep in CLAUDE.md + session notes + TODO
body:
Updates CLAUDE.md Project Status with the new PWA polish + test coverage
entries, adds IconCacheDisclosure to the Architecture tree. Drops
completed items from TODO.md (fixture test, edges/a11y passes,
color-scheme) and rewrites SESSION_NOTES.md as a snapshot of this
session's end-to-end cleanup work.
